name: agentickanbasutra
description: A personal VS Code workbench for planning, running, and reviewing coding-agent attempts.

agenticKanbasutra.completed.visible.description: Show completed tasks in the Kanban board.

agenticKanbasutra.completed.autoDelete.e.description: Automatically delete completed task records after a retention period.

agenticKanbasutra.completed.autoDelete.a.description: Number of days to keep completed task records when automatic cleanup is enabled.

agenticKanbasutra.completed.keepFailed.description: Keep failed tasks even when automatic completed-task cleanup is enabled.

agenticKanbasutra.artifacts.maxLogBytes.description: Maximum stdout or stderr bytes stored per run artifact.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.genericCli.com.description: Shell command template used by the generic CLI runner. Available variables: ${promptFile}, ${repositoryPath}, ${taskTitle}.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.copilotCli.exe.description: Executable used for GitHub Copilot CLI sessions.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.github.default.description: Default model for GitHub Copilot runners. Use auto to inherit the provider default, or set a model id such as gpt-5.3-codex.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.github.modelOp.description: Additional GitHub Copilot model IDs or labels shown in the task editor. Use this for organization-enabled models that are visible in Copilot but not discoverable from a public API.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.github.agentOp.description: Additional GitHub Copilot agent IDs or chat modes shown in the task editor.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.github.executa.description: Executable used for GitHub CLI checks and Copilot Cloud authentication.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.copilotCli.bas.description: Base arguments passed to GitHub Copilot CLI.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.copilotCli.rea.description: Permission arguments used for Copilot CLI read-only tasks.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.copilotCli.all.description: Permission arguments used for Copilot CLI workspace tasks.
Permission arguments used for Copilot CLI worktree tasks.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.copilotCli.byp.description: Permission arguments used when a Copilot CLI task explicitly selects the bypass profile. The default maps to GitHub Copilot CLI's --allow-all behavior.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.copilotCloud.c.description: Ask Copilot Cloud to create a pull request immediately when dispatching a cloud task.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.codexCli.execu.description: Executable used for Codex CLI sessions.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.codex.defaultM.description: Default model for Codex runners. Use auto to inherit the Codex configured model, or set a model id such as gpt-5.5.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.codex.modelOpt.description: Additional Codex model IDs shown in the task editor.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.codex.profileO.description: Additional Codex profile IDs shown as agent/profile options. Profiles from CODEX_HOME/config.toml are also discovered automatically.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.codexCli.baseA.description: Base arguments passed to Codex CLI before the exec subcommand.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.codexCloud.env.description: Codex Cloud environment ID used by the codex-cloud runner.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.codexCloud.att.description: Number of assistant attempts requested for Codex Cloud tasks.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.claudeCli.exec.description: Executable used for Claude Code CLI sessions.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.claude.default.description: Default model for Claude CLI tasks. Use auto to inherit the Claude Code configured model, or set a model alias such as sonnet or opus.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.claude.modelOp.description: Additional Claude model IDs or aliases shown in the task editor.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.claude.profile.description: Additional Claude agent/profile labels shown in the task editor.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.claudeCli.base.description: Base arguments passed to Claude Code CLI before the task prompt.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.claudeCli.read.description: Permission arguments used for Claude CLI read-only tasks.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.claudeCli.allo.description: Permission arguments used for Claude CLI workspace tasks.
Permission arguments used for Claude CLI worktree tasks.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.claudeCli.bypa.description: Permission arguments used when a Claude CLI task explicitly selects the bypass profile.

agenticKanbasutra.runners.toolsProfileOp.description: Additional tool profile presets shown in the task editor. Examples: mcp:github, allow-tool:terminal, or a comma-separated allow-tool list.

enumDescriptions: Queued tasks only start when the user explicitly runs one or drags it into Execution.
Queued tasks start automatically up to the configured concurrency limit.
agenticKanbasutra.queue.executionMode.description: Controls whether queued tasks are started manually by the user or automatically by AgenticKanbasutra.

agenticKanbasutra.queue.maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of queued tasks to execute concurrently.
